holdings.infoBox: PFI is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are Interactive Brokers Group stock at 5.42%, JPMorgan Chase & Co. at 5.22%, Morgan Stanley at 5.19%, The Goldman Sachs Group at 4.00%, and Lemonade at 3.98%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Financial Momentum ETF (PFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. financial firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PFI was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
